languages.text: "Я не понимаю, какие у вас претензии к представител{mf|ю|ьнице} благородного сословия, Изимонд".
"As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."
languages.original_text: "Я не понимаю, какие у вас претензии к представител{mf|ю|ьнице} благородного сословия, Изимонд".

traits.locale_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."
"As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."
"As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

languages.text: «Me parece que no tiene ningún derecho a acusar a un{mf||a} miembro de la nobleza, Sauerback».
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: «Me parece que no tiene ningún derecho a acusar a un{mf||a} miembro de la nobleza, Sauerback».

languages.text: “在我看来，你无权对一名贵族提任何要求，苏尔贝克。”
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: “在我看来，你无权对一名贵族提任何要求，苏尔贝克。”

languages.text: « Je regrette, mais vous n'êtes pas en position de proférer la moindre accusation à l'encontre d'un membre de la noblesse, Sauerback. »
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: « Je regrette, mais vous n'êtes pas en position de proférer la moindre accusation à l'encontre d'un membre de la noblesse, Sauerback. »

languages.text: "Gördüğüm kadarıyla soylu birine karşı herhangi bir iddiada bulunmaya hakkın yok Sauerback."
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: "Gördüğüm kadarıyla soylu birine karşı herhangi bir iddiada bulunmaya hakkın yok Sauerback."

languages.text: "Ich denke, Ihr habt kein Recht, Vorwürfe gegen ein Mitglied des Adels zu erheben, Sauerback."
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, Ihr habt kein Recht, Vorwürfe gegen ein Mitglied des Adels zu erheben, Sauerback."

languages.text: 「私の見解では、貴方は貴族に対して何の要求もする権利はありません、ザウアーバック」
languages.original_text: "As I see it, you have no right to make any claims against a member of the nobility, Sauerback."

traits.locale_text: 「私の見解では、貴方は貴族に対して何の要求もする権利はありません、ザウアーバック」
